REVISED LIST OF THE CANDIDATES WHO HAVE QUALIFIED PROVISIONALLY FOR FINAL WRITTEN EXAMINATION IN CONNECTION WITH THE WEST BENGAL JUDICIAL SERVICE EXAMINATION, 2023 (ADVT. NO. 19/2023), IS BY FURNISHED IN CANCELLATION OF THE EARLIER LIST PUBLISHED BY THE COMMISSION VIDE NOTIFICATION NO. 260 P.S.C./CON. DATED 12-02-2026 AND 261 P.S.C./CON. DATED 12-02-2026

Notification regarding any application for a permit may also be submitted online in the VAHAN-4 portal either for a new permit or for renewal/cancellation/transfer of permit etc in the entire state of West Bengal. Further, any manual application for such service will be completely stopped w.e.f. 1st of December 2021, after which only online applications may be made for such services
